entries.raw_text: Lose track of target and lose the opportunity to strike.
Stumble on your own feet and take 1 round to regain balance.
Misremember move. Hesitate 1 round to refresh your memory.
Overextend yourself. Spend either 2 rounds full parry or 1 round no parry to recover.
The heat of combat has made you forget how or where to attack. Maximum attack is 3 ranks below norm or if below rank 1 must parry for 2 rounds.
Mistake in attack causes awkward position and slight muscle spasms. Parry quickly for 2 rounds if you wish to recover.
Attempt at advanced technique causes confusion for one round. Parry is well done though in wrong direction. 42 Stinger Tiny Fall/Crush Trample 86 80 82 77 80 80 83 79 54 67
Knee strikes opponent's bone causing interesting sensation. Contemplate this for 3 rounds. 42 51 -42 45 -27 48 54 48 51
You "know" your strike was amazing. Foe's lucky but intuitive block leaves you stunned for 2 rounds.
Miserable landing while attempting to regain balance you manage to stun yourself.
In the excitement your 2 feet try to be in 3 places at once. The fall leaves you stunned for 3 rounds, and not able to parry for 2.
You forget even the most basic moves. You smash yourself clumsily against your opponent giving yourself a B crit (crushing).

entries.raw_text: Your grip on the foe's arm is tenuous at best. Forget the attempt and try again next round.
Your attack was weak and off balanced, not affecting your foe at all. You however, need one round to recover.
Stub your toe during delivery. Abort your action and take one round to recover.
Loss of balance during throw leaves you confused. Parry for two rounds to recover.
Ill-timed sweep results in you attempting to trip the ground. Contemplate timing for 2 rounds.
Foes deft move leaves you trying to throw air. Take two rounds to reorient and rebuild confidence.
Foe jumps/steps over your sweep, leaving you in awkward position. Take 1 round (no parry) to recover.
You've suddenly forgotten the joint manipulation needed for the throw to work. Spend next 3 rounds remembering.
You've suddenly understood one of your teacher's criticisms regarding your fighting style. Stunned 2 rounds. Go ahead and reminisce.
Attempt to sweep yourself. Stunned for 2 rounds.
Your indecision regarding whether to sweep or throw causes you to attempt both. Stunned no parry for 3 rounds.
Awkward sweep results in you going down and bumping head. Stunned and unable to parry for 6 rounds.
